description: Public / unauthenticated access — sanctions public list and public declaration search
legal_basis: FATF R.24 c.24.13 (sanctions transparency); Cameroon BO transparency law — [CITATION NEEDED: cameroon-bo-decree-art-Y]; post-Sovim balancing per CJEU C-37/20

interactions.description: Unauthenticated caller retrieves the public sanctions list; natural-person PII must not appear

proceedings[].public_listing_name.note: Entity legal name only — never a natural-person name. The API boundary enforces this.

proceedings[].declarant_principal.note: Sovim post-C-37/20: declarant_principal must never appear on the public list endpoint

proceedings[].beneficial_owners.note: Beneficial-owner PII (names, nationalities) must never appear on the public list endpoint

cache_control.note: Response carries Cache-Control: max-age=86400 (24-hour cache per ADR-0012 Sovim-balancing note)

interactions.description: Public caller reads an entity's public record — entity name, state, lane; no PII

canonical_name.note: Entity legal name; statutory public record

beneficial_owners.note: All natural-person fields are omitted from the public entity endpoint per post-Sovim balancing

interactions.description: Public caller submits a discrepancy report; expects 201 with a feedback_id

body.description: The declared beneficial owner percentage does not match public company filings.

feedback_id.note: UUID identifying the submitted feedback row; returned so the submitter can track triage status

interactions.description: Feedback submission without a CAPTCHA token must be rejected

error_kind.note: Must contain a stable error_kind code; message may be localised per Accept-Language
